channel.title: Privacy on {CodeTrace} - Discover Issues, Share Solutions.

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description:
Privacy Policy

Last updated: [Current Date]

Introduction

Welcome to CodeTrace. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website.

Information We Collect

We may collect information about you in a variety of ways including:

  • Personal Data: Voluntarily provided information which may include your name, email address, and other contact details.
  • Derivative Data: Information our servers automatically collect when you access our website, such as your IP address, browser type, operating system, access times, and the pages you viewed.
  • Cookies and Web Beacons: We may use cookies and web beacons to help customize your experience.

How We Use Your Information

We may use the information we collect in various ways, including to:
